message:
refactor: Continue splitting runtime.zig into focused modules

Extract additional logical groups:
- logic_ops.zig (32 lines): pyOr, pyAnd
- floor_div.zig (21 lines): pyFloorDiv
- pickle_marshal.zig (37 lines): marshalLoads, pickleLoads, pickleLoadsBool
- string_runtime.zig (46 lines): stringSplitWhitespace, strRepeat

runtime.zig: 2277 → 2153 lines (another 124 lines extracted)
Total reduction from original: 2565 → 2153 lines (~16%)
